headline: WEC Energy Group to announce 2026 second-quarter results July 29
summary: WEC Energy Group Inc. (NYSE: WEC) will issue its 2026 second-quarter earnings news release before the stock market opens Wednesday, July 29. A conference call for investors and security analysts is scheduled for the same day at 1 p.m. Central time.

headline: BMO Capital Maintains Market Perform on WEC Energy Group, Lowers Price Target to $117
summary: BMO Capital  analyst James Thalacker   maintains WEC Energy Group (NYSE:WEC) with a Market Perform and lowers the price target from $120 to $117.

headline: WEC Energy Group (WEC) Earnings Expected to Grow: Should You Buy?
summary: WEC Energy (WEC) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.
